description: APED epics breakdown — produced by aped-epics, consumed by aped-story.
_note: top_level intentionally omitted: '## Epic 1: ...', '## Epic 2: ...' headings vary in count per project. Only '## FR Coverage Map' is universally required. Pattern-matching for '^Epic [0-9]+:' deferred to 6.4.0 (DSL field heading_pattern).
